scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @event-platform/shared run build && corepack pnpm --filter @event-platform/ui run build && corepack pnpm --filter @event-platform/api run build && corepack pnpm --filter @event-platform/web run build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @event-platform/shared run typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @event-platform/ui run typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @event-platform/api run typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @event-platform/web run typecheck
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @event-platform/shared run lint && corepack pnpm --filter @event-platform/ui run lint && corepack pnpm --filter @event-platform/api run lint && corepack pnpm --filter @event-platform/web run lint
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @event-platform/shared run test && corepack pnpm --filter @event-platform/ui run test && corepack pnpm --filter @event-platform/api run test && corepack pnpm --filter @event-platform/web run test
scripts.clean: corepack pnpm --filter @event-platform/shared run clean && corepack pnpm --filter @event-platform/ui run clean && corepack pnpm --filter @event-platform/api run clean && corepack pnpm --filter @event-platform/web run clean && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['node_modules','.turbo'].forEach(p=>fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}))"
